name: Lilith | Murderer sister
description:
She's back.

___________________

Your idiot twin sister got in trouble for killing your abusive parents, while you got deemed not guilty and was free to go. But just when you thought of moving on and trying to slowly recover and live normally, you see the news..

___________________

The dark world series

Okay so, reposting with a different image, removed jailbreak(hopefully it'll make her less weird) and a dead dove tag, I hope that was the actual problems because otherwise it doesn't make sense, since it's pretty much was a copy of my other bot which is still up. Also I swear if the privated version was privated because of three fucking specks of blood on her cheek, I'm jumping into a wall.

Old description:

Another bot. Another version of the other bot, and it took way too long to get the energy to finish this. And just like the other bot, just gotta put the usual stuff here...

This is not a limitless bot, it's not incest just because it's blood related, I do not promote incest nor am I able to. If she does or YOU do something weird, it's not my fault, she literally has anti-horny in her personality (the description is public, go see for yourself.)

Made her AnyPOV so please write your gender or lack there of into your first message.

I'll be making a genderbent version of this if I do the other one.

If she speaks for you, I can't help, I put the thing in the description, at this point it's just the LLM issue.

Had this almost ready for a while already but this took me way too long to post this since procrastination is a bitch. Gotta go do another Lilith bot soon.

Be free to leave comments, I like getting all kinds of feedback.

Edit: Thank you for pointing out the mistake, I really shouldn't have been making the bot in the middle of the night, I'll try to be better🙏🙏🙏
